list.name: profile_id
list.label: profile_id
list.definition: SELECT profile_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM validation_summary_day UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM metric_drift_result_r UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM data_risk_root_cause_day UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM metric_value_day UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM data_risk_score_day_v3) a ORDER BY profile_id
list.query: SELECT profile_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM validation_summary_day UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM metric_drift_result_r UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM data_risk_root_cause_day UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM metric_value_day UNION SELECT DISTINCT profile_id FROM data_risk_score_day_v3) a ORDER BY profile_id

title: Data Reliability Control - Operating Review v5

targets.rawSql: SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(dt)) AS time_sec, MAX(fail_count) AS value FROM validation_summary_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(dt)) AS time_sec, MAX(warn_count) AS value FROM validation_summary_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)

panels.title: Latest Drift Alert Metrics

targets.rawSql: SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(dt)) AS time_sec, COUNT(*) AS value FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND drift_status='alert' AND $__timeFilter(dt) AND dt=(SELECT MAX(dt) FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt))

panels.description: Count of alert drift metrics on latest date within selected time range.

panels.title: Latest Drift Warn Metrics

targets.rawSql: SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(dt)) AS time_sec, COUNT(*) AS value FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND drift_status='warn' AND $__timeFilter(dt) AND dt=(SELECT MAX(dt) FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt))

panels.description: Count of warn drift metrics on latest date within selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT rc.dt, rc.cause_type, COUNT(*) AS cause_count, ROUND(AVG(rc.confidence),3) AS avg_confidence FROM data_risk_root_cause_day rc WHERE rc.profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(rc.dt) AND rc.dt=(SELECT MAX(dt) FROM data_risk_root_cause_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)) GROUP BY rc.dt, rc.cause_type ORDER BY cause_count DESC, avg_confidence DESC

panels.title: Data Availability Check

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'data_risk_score_day_v3' AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'validation_summary_day' AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM validation_summary_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'metric_drift_result_r' AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'data_risk_root_cause_day' AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM data_risk_root_cause_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'metric_value_day' AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'metric_correlation_anomaly_day' AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM metric_correlation_anomaly_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'metric_time_anomaly_day' AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM metric_time_anomaly_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'risk_signal_link_day' AS dataset, COUNT(*) AS row_count, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM risk_signal_link_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)

panels.description: Counts by dataset within current time filter. Use this first when a panel shows No data.

targets.rawSql: SELECT dt AS time, 'fail_count' AS metric, fail_count AS value FROM validation_summary_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'warn_count' AS metric, warn_count AS value FROM validation_summary_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'pass_count' AS metric, pass_count AS value FROM validation_summary_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time

SELECT dt AS time, drift_status AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND drift_status IN ('warn','alert') AND $__timeFilter(dt) GROUP BY dt, drift_status ORDER BY time

SELECT dt AS time, metric_name AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name IN ('mapping_coverage_auth','mapping_coverage_loan','mapping_coverage_card','submit_capture_rate','success_outcome_capture_rate') AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time

SELECT dt AS time, 'auth_attempt_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='auth_attempt_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'auth_success_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='auth_success_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'loan_apply_start_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='loan_apply_start_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'loan_apply_submit_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='loan_apply_submit_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'card_apply_start_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='card_apply_start_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT dt AS time, 'card_apply_submit_count' AS metric, metric_value AS value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name='card_apply_submit_count' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY time
SELECT dt AS time, cause_type AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM data_risk_root_cause_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) GROUP BY dt, cause_type ORDER BY time

SELECT dt, hh, rule_group, rule_name, metric_name, validation_status, severity, observed_value, expected_value, diff_value, note FROM validation_result WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, hh DESC, FIELD(validation_status,'fail','warn','pass'), metric_name LIMIT 100

SELECT dt, hh, metric_name, baseline_value, observed_value, drift_score, drift_method, drift_status, severity, detail FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, hh DESC, ABS(drift_score) DESC, metric_name LIMIT 100
SELECT dt, cause_rank, cause_type, related_metric, confidence, detail FROM data_risk_root_cause_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) ORDER BY dt DESC, cause_rank ASC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Top Drift Metrics on Latest Day

targets.rawSql: SELECT dt, hh, metric_name, drift_status, severity, baseline_value, observed_value, drift_score, drift_method, detail FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND dt=(SELECT MAX(dt) FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)) ORDER BY FIELD(drift_status,'alert','warn','stable'), hh DESC, ABS(drift_score) DESC, metric_name LIMIT 50

panels.title: Top Root Causes on Latest Day

targets.rawSql: SELECT dt, cause_rank, cause_type, related_metric, confidence, detail FROM data_risk_root_cause_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) AND dt=(SELECT MAX(dt) FROM data_risk_root_cause_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)) ORDER BY cause_rank ASC LIMIT ${topn}

SELECT dt, metric_name, metric_value FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND metric_name IN ('auth_attempt_count','auth_success_count','loan_apply_start_count','loan_apply_submit_count','card_apply_start_count','card_apply_submit_count','mapping_coverage_auth','mapping_coverage_loan','mapping_coverage_card','submit_capture_rate','success_outcome_capture_rate') AND $__timeFilter(dt) AND dt=(SELECT MAX(dt) FROM metric_value_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)) ORDER BY metric_name

panels.title: Optional Output Layer Availability

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'data_risk_score_day_v3' AS output_name, COUNT(*) AS row_cnt, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'risk_signal_link_day' AS output_name, COUNT(*) AS row_cnt, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM risk_signal_link_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'metric_correlation_anomaly_day' AS output_name, COUNT(*) AS row_cnt, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM metric_correlation_anomaly_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'metric_time_anomaly_day' AS output_name, COUNT(*) AS row_cnt, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM metric_time_anomaly_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)

panels.description: 리스크 스코어/링크/구조 이상치 산출물의 존재 여부를 한눈에 점검

panels.title: No Data Diagnostic Summary

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'risk_score' AS layer, CASE WHEN COUNT(*)>0 THEN 'available' ELSE 'missing' END AS status, COUNT(*) AS row_cnt, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM data_risk_score_day_v3 WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'risk_signal_link' AS layer, CASE WHEN COUNT(*)>0 THEN 'available' ELSE 'missing' END AS status, COUNT(*) AS row_cnt, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM risk_signal_link_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'correlation_anomaly' AS layer, CASE WHEN COUNT(*)>0 THEN 'available' ELSE 'missing' END AS status, COUNT(*) AS row_cnt, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM metric_correlation_anomaly_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'time_pattern_anomaly' AS layer, CASE WHEN COUNT(*)>0 THEN 'available' ELSE 'missing' END AS status, COUNT(*) AS row_cnt, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM metric_time_anomaly_day WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt) UNION ALL SELECT 'drift_alert_only' AS layer, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN drift_status='alert' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)>0 THEN 'available' ELSE 'missing' END AS status, SUM(CASE WHEN drift_status='alert' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS row_cnt, MAX(dt) AS latest_dt FROM metric_drift_result_r WHERE profile_id='${profile_id}' AND $__timeFilter(dt)

panels.description: 현재 기간에 No data로 보이던 패널의 실제 산출물 존재 여부를 요약

panels.title: Interpretation Guide

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'validation_warn high + mapping coverage flat/low' AS pattern_text, 'mapping gap or rule design issue' AS implication, 'check unmapped events and rule thresholds' AS action_guide UNION ALL SELECT 'drift warn/alert rises + root cause=traffic_spike', 'traffic mix change', 'check source/campaign/system inflow' UNION ALL SELECT 'root cause=funnel_distortion', 'funnel step definition or event linkage issue', 'review step mapping and missing submit/success events' UNION ALL SELECT 'optional layers missing', 'pipeline not populated yet', 'keep panel as readiness/coverage check until tables are backfilled'

panels.description: 운영 해석 가이드를 대시보드 안에 같이 배치

options.content:
**How to read this dashboard**

- `validation`, `drift`, `root cause`, `structural anomaly` are active data layers.
- `risk_score` and `risk_signal_link` currently show as optional readiness layers; if row count is 0 in *Data Availability Check*, the issue is upstream generation, not Grafana.
- Drift detail panels in v5 were aligned to the actual schema of `metric_drift_result_r` (`profile_id, dt, hh, metric_name, baseline_value, observed_value, drift_score, drift_method, drift_status, severity, detail`).
